choices.text: RRT/RRT* sampling-based via MoveIt 2 + OMPL. Grid infeasible in high-dim C-space. RRT* asymptotically optimal. CHOMP/TrajOpt for smoothness.
Nav2: global planner (SmacPlanner A*) + local planner (DWB/MPPI) + costmaps + recovery behaviors. ROS 2 standard.
Closed-loop control. u = Kp×e + Ki×∫e + Kd×de/dt. P (current error) + I (eliminate offset) + D (damp). Tune via Ziegler-Nichols. Anti-windup on saturation.

questions.explanation: PID = P + I + D feedback control.

choices.text: Trapezoidal velocity profile (accel + cruise + decel) for industrial. S-curve for jerk-limited (smoother motor wear). Quintic polynomial for smooth jerk. MoveIt time-parameterization handles automatically.
RL (PPO/SAC) trained in Isaac Gym with 1000+ parallel envs + domain randomization for sim2real. Imitation learning (behavior cloning + DAgger) bootstraps from demos. VLA foundation models emerging.

questions.explanation: RL + imitation + sim2real for hard manipulation.
